name: stitch-build
description: Code generation and build tools for Google Stitch: convert designs to React components, create Remotion walkthroughs, and integrate shadcn/ui.

interface.longDescription: Use Google Stitch build tools to convert Stitch screens into React component systems, generate walkthrough videos with Remotion, and work with shadcn/ui integration patterns.
defaultPrompt: Convert these Stitch screens to React components
Generate a walkthrough video for this Stitch project
Set up shadcn/ui for this design
